name: Dutch Leek Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together the flour, bouillon cubes, and water in a bowl.
2. In another bowl, stir in milk and mace until well combined.
3. Gradually add the mixture to the soup pot containing boiling water.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to simmer.
5. Simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Add chopped leeks and cream, then continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Serve with shredded cheese on top of the soup at the table.
